body.u: When I left school at the age of 17 I didn’t have a job I had just finished taking the secretarial course. I couldn’t get a job then my family and I moved we came to another city where I went back to school I didn’t want to leave yet because moving to a new place I wanted to get to know a few people first. When I grew up I wanted to be rich. Well I left school and found a job as a secretary it was quite good money as well. I kept that job I went out quite a lot to discos and things.
I saved up some money and went on holidays with my friend. My family and I were not rich but we were not poor either.

When I was about 23 I got married and moved away from my family I used to go and see them quite a lot. Then I had my first child {what?} I always want a little boy we were all very happy together by now I was about 27 nearly half my life had gone although I wouldn’t have known. We went out quite alota lot when we could get a babysitter and that wasn’t very often. My son was beginning to grow up now. And I had a little girl that was what I wanted a boy then a girl I was about 30 now. We couldn’t afford to go out so much. The years went by we all grew older I was retired my son about 19 and daughter about 17 or around there some wheresomewhere my son got married we seen him quite alota lot as well by now my mother and father had died and so had my husband I have alwayalways been afraid of dying and I still am. But everyoneseveryone's got to die sometimes- in their life.
